title: QAOA
description: Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA) for solving the Max-Cut combinatorial optimization problem on a user-defined graph.

params.help: Number of qubits, corresponding to the number of vertices in the graph.
params.name: n
params.info: 请输入正整数，范围在2到12之间（如 6）

params.help: Number of QAOA evolution layers (p). Higher p yields a better approximation ratio.
params.name: layers
params.info: 请输入正整数，范围在1到10之间（如 4）

params.help: Maximum number of COBYLA classical optimizer iterations.
params.name: max_iter

params.help: Edge list defining the graph topology. Each edge must be a pair [u, v], and every vertex index must be an integer in [0, n-1].
params.name: edges
params.info: 请输入边列表，每条边为[u,v]，顶点编号必须在0到n-1之间（如 [[0,1],[1,2]]）
